instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall control clutch hydraulic pressure during engagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall increase clutch pressure when clutch engagement command is issued.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall regulate clutch pressure to prevent slip.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall increase pressure when Clutch_Slip exceeds Slip_Threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall reduce clutch pressure during disengagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall decrease pressure when clutch disengagement command is issued.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor clutch pressure levels.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Clutch_Pressure exceeds Pressure_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Pressure > Pressure_Limit THEN Pressure_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall control pressure ramp rate during clutch engagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall increase pressure gradually according to Ramp_Rate.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain clutch pressure during steady operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain pressure when clutch engagement is complete.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect insufficient clutch pressure.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Clutch_Pressure falls below Minimum_Pressure.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Pressure < Minimum_Pressure THEN Pressure_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall isolate pressure control faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall identify fault source when Pressure_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe pressure during faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall apply default pressure when Pressure_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall clear pressure faults after recovery.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear pressure fault when Clutch_Pressure returns to normal range.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Pressure BETWEEN Minimum_Pressure AND Pressure_Limit THEN Clear_Pressure_Fault
IF Clutch_Pressure OUTSIDE Normal_Range THEN Maintain_Fault_State
